name: Sketch
description: Vector design tool for UI/UX designers — symbols, shared styles, prototyping

extraction.notes: Primary feed URL from SUFeedURL in app bundle. Also available on Mac App Store (id402476602) via iTunes API (https://itunes.apple.com/lookup?id=402476602).

changelog.notes: Release notes in <description> or <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> elements within appcast item.

notes: Mac App Store + direct download. Website download uses Sparkle auto-updater. Subscription model (paid). Appcast feed at update.sketch.com may require user agent header. Download URL obtained from Sparkle enclosure element in appcast.
